text:
Created attachment 190227
libreoffice6.patch v2

IT'S RELEASE TIME!

https://wiki.documentfoundation.org/ReleaseNotes/6.0

The distro-install-desktop-integration went away. The package builds successfully! cppunit is bundled again.

This still depends on bug 224282 and bug 224284.
